title: MacOS: Cannot build even a hello-world image
body:
### Issue Description

Cannot build even a toy `FROM alpine` image.
`podman build -t xxx -f Containerfile.minimal` gets stuck.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue

```sh
jb@jbs-Mac-mini ~/tmp> podman machine ls
NAME                     VM TYPE     CREATED         LAST UP            CPUS        MEMORY      DISK SIZE
podman-machine-default*  qemu        12 minutes ago  Currently running  3           8GiB        100GiB
jb@jbs-Mac-mini ~/tmp> cat Containerfile.minimal
from alpine

RUN echo "test"

jb@jbs-Mac-mini ~/tmp> podman build --log-level=debug -t xxx -f Containerfile.minimal
INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug
DEBU[0000] Called build.PersistentPreRunE(podman build --log-level=debug -t xxx -f Containerfile.minimal)
DEBU[0000] SSH Ident Key "/Users/jb/.ssh/podman-machine-default" SHA256:Yw/PdkkP1BuuheYmI2KRIw0jEZcY1XtBMVglKBfaNZA ssh-ed25519
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: GET URI: http://d/v4.9.0/libpod/_ping
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf"
DEBU[0000] DoRequest Method: POST URI: http://d/v4.9.0/libpod/build
^C⏎                                

jb@jbs-Mac-mini ~/tmp [SIGINT]> podman version
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.9.0
API Version:  4.9.0
Go Version:   go1.21.6
Git Commit:   f7c7b0a7e437b6d4849a9fb48e0e779c3100e337
Built:        Mon Jan 22 23:02:17 2024
OS/Arch:      darwin/arm64

Server:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.8.3
API Version:  4.8.3
Go Version:   go1.21.5
Built:        Wed Jan  3 15:10:40 2024
OS/Arch:      linux/arm64
```

### Describe the results you received

Gets stuck for a few minutes.

### Describe the results you expected

A new image successfully created

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

Additional environment details

### Additional information
